name: Minesweeper: Find Bombs
description: Minesweeper - Find Bombs is a classic puzzle experience that challenges your logic and attention to detail. Carefully analyze the grid, reveal hidden clues, and locate every bomb without making a mistake. Clear all bombs to pass the level and master this timeless brain teaser. Made with GODOT 4.5
instructions: HOW TO PLAY Left Click Open the cells Long Press Plant remove a flag Goal Clear the field without hitting a mine
